events.title: Wrong Platform
events.body: A parent slides a sealed copy of Goblin Kart for NovaCube across the counter. "My kid's birthday is tomorrow and I just realized — they have the PrismBox, not whatever this is. Please tell me there's something we can do."

choices.label: Swap it for the PrismBox copy at the same price.
Bundle the PrismBox copy with a discounted used controller.
Point at the "opened or sealed, no exchanges" sign and decline.

events.title: The Scratched Disc
events.body: A regular slides a stack of disc cases across the counter. "Trading these in — same deal as last time. Except this one." He taps a case on top. "I know it's scratched. I'm hoping you'll still count it full value since I've been coming here for years."

choices.label: Count it full trade-in value — he's a regular.
Offer half value on the scratched disc, full on the rest.
Decline the scratched disc per policy, process the rest.
